title: RamseyOS Quick Capture Entry
description: A raw capture from the Quick Capture input. Captures are unprocessed items that land in the Universal Inbox for later triage. They are intentionally unstructured — the point is speed, not categorization.

content.description: The raw captured text. Could be a task, idea, note, reminder, or anything.

source.description: Where the capture was initiated from.

status.description: Processing status. Unprocessed items appear in the Universal Inbox.

processedAs.description: What this capture became after processing. Filled in when the user triages the item.

type.description: What the capture was converted to.

referenceId.description: ID of the created task, note, or event.

workspaceHint.description: Optional workspace tag added at capture time if the user knows where it belongs.

type.description: Classification of the capture. Defaults to 'capture' and can be changed during triage.

tags.description: Freeform tags for categorization, applied during triage.

projectId.description: Optional reference to a project this capture belongs to.

processed.description: Whether this capture has been triaged.
